name: Pork United Nations
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Pork cut from pork loin
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork into strips about ½ inch thick.
2. Heat the vegetable oil in a wide skillet over medium heat.
3. Place the pork in the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, for about 5 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, combine the Cajun seasoning, lemon juice, honey, and soy sauce in a separate bowl.
5. Add the mixture to the pork and stir to coat the meat evenly.
6. Continue cooking until the pork is cooked through (this should take only a few more minutes) and the sauce is hot.
7. Serve over hot rice.
8. Serve with slices of grapefruit and avocado.
